disease.name: plant_disease_mobilenetv2
limitations: Trained on PlantVillage LAB images (single leaf, plain background). Real field-photo accuracy is much lower — top-1 can be wrong, so the app shows the top possibilities, not one confident answer.
Confidence is uncalibrated softmax and must not be read as agronomic certainty.
Covers only the 14 PlantVillage crops. It does NOT cover onion, cotton, wheat, or sunflower.
The app rejects tomato diagnoses unless tomato labels receive at least 60% of the full multi-crop score and the top two tomato matches are separated by at least 15 percentage points.
The crop is selected by the user; the image model does not independently confirm the host crop.
Always confirm with a local agronomist before any treatment.

banana_disease.name: banana_cordana_vgg19_int8
banana_disease.architecture: VGG19 transfer learning, ONNX QDQ INT8
limitations: The supplied Cordana smoke photo is duplicated in the source validation data.
Confidence is uncalibrated and no independent field accuracy is claimed.
The model has no healthy or out-of-domain class, so it cannot independently rule out a healthy banana leaf or non-banana image.
The crop is selected by the user; the image model does not independently confirm the host crop.
Use for local evaluation only because the source repository does not declare a model or dataset license.
